name: Western Union
description_short: At 614 632 Clinton St, Hoboken, NJ 07030, Western Union offers check cashing and money transfer services. Call +1 201-795-5005 for more information.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a federally-chartered, member-owned credit union headquartered in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma. The institution operates multiple branch locations across the Tulsa metropolitan area, including Broken Arrow, Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa, with extended hours including Saturday drive-through service. As a credit union, WSFCU is not-for-profit and NCUA-insured, meaning earnings are returned to members rather than shareholders.

WSFCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans, certificates of deposit, boat loans, money market accounts, checking and savings accounts, mortgage loans, and personal loans. Their flagship product is the Kasasa Cash Back Checking account, which provides 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle. Auto loans are prominently featured with rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles, while boat loans start at 7.64% APR. The credit union also advertises certificates with yields as high as 3.46% APY, helping members grow savings.

WSFCU distinguishes itself through its community-focused mission and educational outreach. The institution regularly hosts community events (Shred Day, Car Shows, Electronics Recycling), provides financial education content covering topics like credit scores, debt consolidation, and safe shopping practices, and emphasizes personalized member service. The credit union actively supports local initiatives, having made donations to school districts and community programs. Member testimonials highlight exceptional customer service, particularly around credit-building assistance.

As a credit union, WSFCU's main limitation is geographic—membership is primarily restricted to individuals living or working in specific Oklahoma counties and their families. Service offerings are solid but less extensive than large national banks. While rates are competitive, they require membership qualification and credit approval. The institution appears well-managed and member-focused, making it an excellent choice for eligible Oklahoma residents seeking relationship-based banking with community commitment.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online application option
Kasasa Cash Back Checking provides 3% cash back on debit purchases up to $400 per cycle
Certificate of Deposit yields up to 3.46% APY for savings growth
Multiple branch locations with extended hours including Saturday drive-through service and on-site ATMs
Member-owned, non-profit structure returns earnings to members rather than shareholders
Strong financial education program with regular articles on credit, debt management, and fraud prevention
Active community involvement including local donations, Shred Days, and electronics recycling programs
cons: Membership eligibility is geographically restricted to Oklahoma residents and qualifying family members
All loans subject to credit approval; competitive rates not guaranteed for all applicants
Boat loans at 7.64% APR are higher than auto loan rates, limiting appeal for boat financing
Money Market account yield of 1.20% APY is modest compared to online-only savings institutions
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto financing with personal relationship banking
Members prioritizing community-focused financial institutions with educational support
Savers interested in certificates of deposit and cash-back checking rewards
Borrowers with improving credit who value credit-building assistance and member service
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma residents who qualify for membership and seek competitive auto financing combined with personalized, community-oriented banking. The main caveat is geographic eligibility restriction—you must live or work in specific Oklahoma counties to join, making it unavailable to consumers outside that region.
services: Debit cards with cash back rewards
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
